info.title: FF++ C23 (DeepfakeBench-ready)
info.subtitle: Comprehensive deepfake detection datasets in unified format
info.description:
# Multi-Dataset Deepfake Detection Collection

**Last Updated**: January 16, 2026

## 📊 Dataset Overview

This is a comprehensive collection of deepfake detection datasets standardized to the FaceForensics++ format for easy integration and benchmarking.

### Included Datasets

#### Frame-Based Datasets
- **Celeb-DF**: 888 real + 5,645 fake sequences (Celebrity faces)
- **UADFV**: 49 real + 49 fake sequences (Face2Face manipulation)
- **DFDC**: 1,052 real sequences (Deepfake Detection Challenge)
- **Method A**: Custom manipulation method
- **Method B**: Alternative manipulation technique

#### Video-Based Datasets
- **FaceForensics++**: 7,000+ videos with 5 manipulation methods
  - Deepfakes
  - Face2Face
  - FaceSwap
  - NeuralTextures
  - FaceShifter

## 📁 Structure

All datasets follow the standardized FaceForensics++ directory structure:

```
frames/[Dataset_Name]/
├── original_sequences/youtube/c23/frames/
│   └── [video_id]/
│       ├── 000.png
│       ├── 001.png
│       └── ...
└── manipulated_sequences/[Method]/c23/frames/
    └── [video_id]/
        ├── 000.png
        └── ...
```

## 🎯 Use Cases

- Training deepfake detection models
- Benchmarking detection algorithms
- Transfer learning experiments
- Multi-dataset evaluation
- Cross-dataset generalization studies

## 📈 Statistics

- **Total Real Sequences**: ~1,989
- **Total Fake Sequences**: ~5,694
- **Total Videos**: 7,000+
- **Total Size**: ~33 GB
- **Format**: PNG frames + MP4 videos

## 🚀 Quick Start
## 📝 Citation

If you use this dataset collection, please cite the original papers:

- FaceForensics++: https://github.com/ondyari/FaceForensics
- Celeb-DF: https://github.com/yuezunli/celeb-deepfakeforensics
- DFDC: https://ai.facebook.com/datasets/dfdc/

## 📄 License

CC0-1.0 (Individual datasets may have their own licenses)

## 🔄 Version Notes

Updated 2026-01-16: Standardized multi-dataset collection

---

**Maintainer**: Ahmed Elbanby  
**Format**: FaceForensics++ Compatible  
**Compression**: c23 (balanced quality/size)
info.userSpecifiedSources:
Primary data source: FaceForensics++ (FF++) video dataset, which contains 1,000 original (real) video sequences and multiple manipulated versions generated with automated face manipulation methods.​

Manipulation methods included in this upload: Deepfakes, Face2Face, FaceSwap, NeuralTextures, plus additional method folders present in the source packaging used here (DeepFakeDetection and FaceShifter).​

Compression setting: This release uses the c23 compressed version, intended to represent realistic re-encoding/compression conditions.​

Packaging goal / downstream tooling: The directory structure is designed to be compatible with DeepfakeBench-style workflows (consistent dataset management and evaluation pipelines).​
